- Leatherface no longer assisting on ally stuns as expected

Check out the full list of bug fixes here: http://go.wbgames.com/MKMobileReleaseNotes

title: Rise of Kingdoms ―万国覚醒―
notes:
Greetings Governor,
We plan to update the game to version 1.1.08: Starlit Blaze on 【UTC 2026/6/3 06:00】. The servers will be down for an estimated 【3 hours】 during the update. We apologize for any inconvenience this might cause and will send you a reward as compensation once the update is complete.

title: Minecraft: Dream it, Build it!
notes: Various bug fixes!

title: Tiles Survive!
notes:
[Optimizations & Fixes]
- Added a new "Skip" button to Honor Expedition, allowing Chiefs to instantly complete battles during Quick Challenge.

- Optimized the purchase logic for Arena Challenge Tickets in the VIP Store. When neither Arena nor 3v3 Arena is available, this item can no longer be purchased to prevent accidental Gem spending.

- Improved recruitment animations and the skip experience, and fixed a rare issue that could cause lag during consecutive recruitments.
